title: AstikorCarts Redux
description: Horse powered carts and plows, now for 1.20!
body:
## Astikor Carts Redux
A continuation of the mod [**AstikorCarts**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/astikorcarts), updated for Forge (and NeoForge) 1.20+ under the MIT license.

Fabric users, check out [NiftyCarts!](https://modrinth.com/mod/niftycarts)

## Carts
### Supply Cart
Bring your storage with you on your journey! Up to a double chests worth! One seat on the back. Shift-right click to access the inventory!

![Supply Cart](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/CXd6g9xp/images/6893627cf0b30eaa37e3f5e1752e40f8bd7b6a46.gif "Supply Cart")

### Animal Cart
Carry along your animals, players & NPC companions with the two seats on this cart!
![Animal Cart](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/CXd6g9xp/images/5bd43402b8842303d1c65493b2af3f290c8c7009.gif "Animal Cart")

### Plow
Till fields quickly, strip logs, or make paths!
![Plow](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/CXd6g9xp/images/e56a6022ae274cb7bb713ad157032e9031c16fc5.gif "Plow")

## Usage
'R' by default is the attach/detach entity key. This 'Action Key' hotkey can be rebound.
Toggling sprint changes the speed of the cart and mount.

### Mod Showcase by VegaCraftYT (deutsch)
[![YT Showcase](https://img.youtube.com/vi/6AKUTFGY8fk/0.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6AKUTFGY8fk)
